title: Section 6
content: In order to assist the Council in the discharge of its functions, each of the Ministries of the Central Government dealing with matters relating to Defence, Finance, Home Affairs 1[Planning and the Department of Development of North-Eastern Region] shall nominate an officer to attend the meetings of the Council.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 6, ibid., for "and Planning" (w.e.f. 26-6-2003).
